items.titolo: Fujitsu plans dedicated 1.4nm AI chip manufactured entirely in Japan by Rapidus — AI chip to be designed and manufactured domestically
items.descrizione: Fujitsu plans to develop an NPU fabricated on an advanced 1.4nm process by Rapidus, designed for AI inference in servers and related systems.

items.titolo: Opera Neon: ChatGPT e Claude controllano il browser
items.descrizione: Opera Neon permette a ChatGPT, Claude e altri agenti AI di controllare il browser in tempo reale: navigare, compilare moduli, estrarre dati, ecc. The post Opera Neon: ChatGPT e Claude controllano il browser appeared firs
